---
title: "Royals vs. Braves · 2026-03-29"
description: "Velosalida y lanzángulo · Atlanta, GA"
date: "March 30, 2026"
categories: [royals, 2026, game-report, atlanta-braves]
image: report_cards/royals_2026-03-29_braves.png
author: "Peter Fortunato"
---

```{r}
#| fig-show: hold
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| results: hide
#| message: false
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

source(here::here("functions/game_report.R"))
plot_game_report("2026-03-29", "Braves", "ATL")
```
## El sweet spot

Finalmente, llegamos al primer win of the season, gracias a un home run from Jensen, un doble de Loftin, y dos hard hit singles from Witt Jr. and Pasquantino.

## Debajo de la media

Tough day for Calglianone y Loftin (afuera de su doble). 

## Mirando adelante

Fuimos a la playa. We finally defrosted and went to the beach to avoid an Opening Series Sweep.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Fuente: Baseball Savant · ProPlotFits*
